$comment: Machine-readable copy of TEMPLATE_SCHEMA.md. Keep both in sync. Consumed by automation/validate-template-structure.js.

page.description: One physical printed page. Background and margin tokens apply here.

header.description: Holds the logo and the per-page meta line.

footer.description: Holds the legal line and pagination.

corner-decoration.description: The decorative corner graphic. Optional, no asset supplied to the design system as of schema v1.0.
